scratch: Sprint 7 queue seeded 2026-07-13 after Sprint 6 merged (PR #33, v3.3.0). NOT YET LAUNCHED - read SPRINT_7.md launch checklist. THEME: GCP LIVE PATH + CLOSE THE CLIENT LOOP. Dave's GCP posture = Vertex AI via ADC, NO static API keys (inherited from kentro-cloud-modernization); feasibility PROVEN 2026-07-13 (direct generateContent to us-central1-aiplatform / kentro-cloudmod-dev / gemini-2.5-flash with local ADC -> HTTP 200). T0 adds google-auth dep -> REBUILD api image. Infra decision (Dave 2026-07-13): LOCAL CONTAINERS FOR NOW, no terraform/cloud deploy. Live tasks (T1) opt-in - self-skip without SHIELD_LLM_MODE=live so loop/CI stay green. T3 flips SHIELD_EMAIL_DELIVERY_ENABLED=true in dev compose (require_email_verify STAYS false - flipping it breaks all e2e sign-ins). T5 (Auth.js v5) is the riskiest task - run LAST of the feature tasks, full e2e before commit. SIX gates now (web eslint added mid-Sprint-6). CRITICAL: ruff==0.15.20/black==26.5.1 pinned + known-first-party=['app'] in ROOT pyproject - do not remove. gh auth switch before gh writes. Never commit credentials/ADC; token never in logs/error_message.
gates: export PATH="$PATH:/c/Program Files/Docker/Docker/resources/bin" && cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && docker compose exec -T api pytest -m unit -q
export PATH="$PATH:/c/Program Files/Docker/Docker/resources/bin" && cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && docker compose exec -T web sh -lc "cd /app && pnpm -F web exec tsc --noEmit"

cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && NODE_DIR=$(ls -d "$LOCALAPPDATA/Microsoft/WinGet/Packages/OpenJS.NodeJS.LTS"*/node-v*-win-x64 2>/dev/null | head -1) && export PATH="$PATH:$NODE_DIR" && npx -y prettier@3.9.5 --check "**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,json,md,yml,yaml}"
export PATH="$PATH:/c/Program Files/Docker/Docker/resources/bin" && cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && docker compose exec -T api sh -lc "cd /app && ruff check --no-cache . && black --check ."
export PATH="$PATH:/c/Program Files/Docker/Docker/resources/bin" && cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && docker compose exec -T web sh -lc "cd /app && pnpm -F web test"
export PATH="$PATH:/c/Program Files/Docker/Docker/resources/bin" && cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && docker compose exec -T web sh -lc "cd /app && pnpm -F web lint"
notes_global: e2e on the HOST via the winget node.exe + e2e/node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js; base URL from root .env WEB_PORT via e2e/helpers/baseUrl.ts (Dave's box :3001, canonical/CI :3000). Poll long gates (pytest, e2e) in the FOREGROUND to the end of the iteration in sub-9-minute bursts - NEVER park on background monitors (bit us 4x in Sprint 6). Docker CLI needs the PATH export per shell. After ANY apps/web or packages/* edit: docker compose up -d --force-recreate web BEFORE e2e. After apps/api/pyproject.toml dep changes (T0 google-auth): docker compose build api && docker compose up -d api - a plain restart does NOT install deps. New python module under app/ needs docker compose restart api; NEVER restart api mid-pytest (SIGKILL 137). After apps/web/package.json changes (T5 next-auth v5): reinstall INSIDE the web container. Seed idempotent: docker compose exec -T api python scripts/seed_demo.py. Logins admin@kentro.example / client@atlas.example, DemoPass!2026; spec-created users need unique timestamped emails. LLM fixture-mode default (D-017). Live env (gitignored .env, revert after validation): SHIELD_LLM_MODE=live SHIELD_LLM_PROVIDER=vertex SHIELD_LLM_MODEL=gemini-2.5-flash GCP_PROJECT_ID=kentro-cloudmod-dev GCP_REGION=us-central1; ADC via bind-mounted gcloud config dir, GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS pointing at the mounted file - never committed, never in the image, token never in logs or llm_calls.error_message (mirror the Gemini key-in-header lesson, llm.py:231). Tenant enforcement: require_*_in_tenant 404s (never 403); resolve seeded ids ONLY via e2e/helpers/ids.ts. Playwright gotchas: getByRole name matching is SUBSTRING; click()+waitForResponse not check() on auto-save; assert post-Run-AI state after page.reload(); no body click before first Tab in skip-link tests.

tasks.title: Vertex AI provider adapter via ADC (D-029)
verify: google-auth added to apps/api deps; api image rebuilt; in-container `python -c 'import google.auth'` succeeds
vertex in LLMProvider literal; VertexProvider hits {region}-aiplatform.googleapis.com generateContent with Bearer ADC token; shared body-build/parse factored with GeminiProvider (no duplication)
bearer token NEVER in logs, llm_calls.error_message, or exception text (unit test locks it - mirror gemini key-in-header lesson)
live_llm_readiness: vertex requires gcp_project_id + google-auth importable + ADC resolvable, loud RuntimeError at boot otherwise; fixture unaffected; /admin/ai-status + /ready inherit
compose bind-mounts host gcloud dir read-only + GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS set; ADC never copied into repo or image
DECISIONS gains D-029
tasks.notes: See SPRINT_7.md T0. Feasibility proven 2026-07-13: direct curl with ADC token to us-central1-aiplatform / kentro-cloudmod-dev / gemini-2.5-flash -> HTTP 200, correct response. Request/response schema identical to GeminiProvider (generateContent) - factor shared helpers. google.auth.default(scopes=['https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform']), refresh lazily. Windows host gcloud dir is %APPDATA%/gcloud - compose var with sensible default, document the quirk.

SMOKE_TEST 14/14.1 annotated GCP-validated with date + provider/model; honesty convention (opt-in spec is the proof, CI-skip noted)

tasks.notes: See SPRINT_7.md T1. Requires host gcloud ADC (launch checklist item 5). This is the sprint's is-it-real payoff: five real Vertex calls through the redaction seam.
